news.t: New Look at Apple Could Put These ETFs in Focus

holdings.infoBox: AAPD is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AAPL Bear 1X ETF (AAPD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Apple stock. AAPD was launched on Aug 9, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: New Look at Apple Could Put These ETFs in Focus
data.text: Apple (AAPL), the second-largest U.S. company by market capitalization, made big news on Monday, announcing that CEO Tim Cook is stepping down, effective September 1. He's moving to the role of execut...
